patents.name: CAMP'360
patents.description: CAMP'360 is a software-defined, multi-modular campus governance system that utilizes a distributed mobile-node architecture as the sole data acquisition layer, replacing traditional physical IoT infrastructure. The system leverages the native hardware peripherals of user smartphones (GPS, Wi-Fi, and Biometrics) to create a virtualized sensor network for real-time institutional management. This integrated ecosystem facilitates device-less transit telemetry via driver-side mobiles, enforces network-bound attendance validation restricted to authorized institutional Wi-Fi IP addresses, and centralizes academic workflows. Furthermore, the system includes integrated modules for cashless campus commerce, dietary tracking, and robust feedback loops, fusing administrative, safety, and logistical data into a unified, secure mobile interface to enhance operational efficiency and transparency within the educational environments.
